data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a parts deposit for special orders. However, while the linked use case mentions a parts deposit of $280, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the mechanism for handling special orders or the conditions under which the deposit is applied. The evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the system correctly processes a parts deposit specifically for special orders, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of parts deposits specifically for special orders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Check parts deposit handling for special orders
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the system correctly processes a parts deposit when a special order is placed.
